getting_the_job.phase_4_entry_hack: Identify a target firm’s AI-generated blog hallucinations. Send a 'Logic Failure' report to the CTO showing exactly where their model is lying to customers, with a corrected system prompt attached.
Social engineer a support rep to reveal their internal LLM system prompt. Send the jailbreak to the CSO with a bill for an 'Unauthorized Audit' and a solution.
Scrape the LinkedIn 'Connections' of the VP of Sales. Find their biggest lost lead. Record a video showing how you would have closed that specific deal and send it to them at 7 AM on a Monday.
Infiltrate building committee meetings in Baner/Hinjewadi. Identify lifts with 3+ breakdowns a month. Pitch a 'Predictive IoT Retrofit' as an independent contractor before the OEM arrives.
Scour public trial protocols at Serum Institute for 'Inclusion Criteria' logic errors. Present the efficiency hack to the Lead PI as a way to shave 3 months off the Phase II timeline.
Monitor a target firm's public IP range for open ports. Send a 'Security Posture Audit' to their IT manager showing them exactly what you found before a hacker does.
Build a CI/CD pipeline for an open-source tool the target company uses. Submit a PR that fixes their build-speed bottleneck and link it in your application.
Find a user complaining about a target firm's software on Reddit. Write a 3-step 'Value Realization' guide for that user and send it to the firm's Head of CS as proof of initiative.
Run a $50 A/B test on a target company’s ad copy using your own money. Present the winning creative and the ROAS data to their Marketing Lead as your resume.
Get a basic drone license. Pitch yourself to wind farm operators in Maharashtra as a 'Remote Blade Inspector' to reduce their high-risk climbing hours.
Identify a recurring QC failure in a local Tier-2 automotive supplier. Draft a 'Lean Six Sigma' corrective action plan and hand-deliver it to the Plant Manager.
Map out the 5 most fuel-inefficient routes for a local logistics aggregator using telematics data. Present the 'Fuel Alpha' fix to the Operations Director.
File 5 RTI requests regarding local municipal spending anomalies. Package the results into a 'Data transparency' report and send it to local newsrooms as a portfolio.
Audit a target company’s public financial statements for 'deferred tax' inconsistencies. Send a summary to the CFO showing them where they might be leaking cash.
Calculate the carbon footprint of a target firm’s primary shipping route. Present a 'Green Logistics' plan that saves 10% on carbon credits.
